name: EventHandler - VehicleMovement
description: Verify VehicleMovement EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Search for skill with VehicleMovement handler
steps.code: var found = false; var skills = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate"); foreach(var skillName in skills) { var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", skillName, "EventHandlers"); if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { if(h.GetType().Name == "VehicleMovement") { found = true; break; } } if(found) break; } } found

steps.name: Load EventHandlers from a specific skill
Verify _type field readable
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "active.move_vehicle", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { var typeField = h.GetType().GetField("_type"); if(typeField != null) { found = true; break; } } } found

steps.name: Read Concealment parameter field from VehicleMovement
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "active.move_vehicle", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { if(h.GetType().Name == "VehicleMovement") { var field = h.GetType().GetField("Concealment"); if(field != null) { found = true; break; } } } } found
